changes.description: Added canonical DURATION scale export (MICRO, FAST, STANDARD, UI, SCREEN, DRAMATIC, FRAME, ZOOM) and updated all presets to use it
Added NEEDS_BUFFER_PAIRS for emotional intensity transitions; buffer transitions now use DRAMATIC timing (0.5s) vs standard SCREEN (0.3s); imported DURATION and easing constants from animations.ts

failureAnalysis: Pre-existing failures unrelated to transition changes: UI selector mismatches, screen arc test outdated, missing stills files
